reasoning: For Nov 16, FIDE only updates rankings monthly on the 1st, so the Nov 9 ranking of 8th will surely remain on Wikipedia (p=0.95). By Dec 9, the Dec 1 ranking will be out. Wesley So is 8th in a tight cluster of players (he's 1 point ahead of 9th and 2 points ahead of 10th; but 4 and 5 points behind 7th and 6th). His rank is slightly more likely to drop than rise or stay because active juniors (Gukesh, Firouzja) are very close behind him, so p=0.42. By Feb 2026, rankings will drift further with more events. Increased variance flattens out the rank probabilities, pushing the chance of him being 8th or better closer to 0.5 (p=0.48).
